summary: Iteration 240: Complete testing of Referral System Revamp features. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Customer dashboard shows referral balance/rewards, Referrals page has all 5 sections (wallet summary, referral link/code, how it works, activity table, wallet rules), Admin Settings Hub has Referral & Wallet section with 4 configurable fields. Bank Transfer page has post-checkout referral CTA component.

issues: ReferralPointsBanner component exists but CustomerDashboardV3 uses its own referral card implementation - this is by design, not a bug

bank_transfer_referral_cta.component: post-checkout-referral-cta exists in BankTransferPage.jsx with Share button

checkout_wallet_integration.note: CheckoutPageV2 has wallet usage block implementation but is not currently routed. AccountCheckoutPage is used for /account/checkout. Wallet integration in checkout may need to be added to AccountCheckoutPage.

action_items: Consider integrating wallet usage block from CheckoutPageV2 into AccountCheckoutPage for logged-in customer checkout flow
critical_code_review_comments: Backend referral_hooks.py correctly implements tier-aware reward calculation from distribution margin
customer_referral_routes.py properly returns all required fields for dashboard and referrals page
admin_settings_hub_routes.py has referral settings in commercial section with proper defaults
margin_engine.py get_split_settings() correctly reads referral_share_pct from admin settings
ReferralPointsBanner component exists but CustomerDashboardV3 uses its own implementation - both work correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 240 verified Referral System Revamp: (1) All customer referral APIs working - /overview, /me, /stats, /wallet-usage-rules return correct schema. (2) Admin settings hub has Referral & Wallet section in Commercial Rules tab with referral_pct=10%, max_wallet_usage_pct=30%, min_order=0, max_reward=0. (3) Customer dashboard (CustomerDashboardV3) shows referral balance KPI and referral rewards card with copy code functionality. (4) Customer /account/referrals page has all 5 sections: wallet summary, referral link/code, how it works, activity table, wallet rules. (5) BankTransferPage has post-checkout referral CTA. (6) CheckoutPageV2 has wallet usage block but is not routed - AccountCheckoutPage is used instead. (7) referral_hooks.py implements tier-aware reward calculation from distribution margin, triggered on payment verification.
